subcodes.first_line: O brethren of purity and stars like unto the Pleiades! The love of God is the radiance of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اخوان صفا و اختران چون ثریا محبت الله پر تو شمس حقیقت است
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
